description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the php:7.1.1 Docker image with a mysql:5.7 service and defines MYSQL_DATABASE and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD variables for the database. Cache the vendor/ directory between jobs. In the global before_script, run apt-get update -yqq, install git libmcrypt-dev libpq-dev libcurl4-gnutls-dev libicu-dev libvpx-dev libjpeg-dev libpng-dev libxpm-dev zlib1g-dev libfreetype6-dev libxml2-dev libexpat1-dev libbz2-dev libgmp3-dev libldap2-dev unixodbc-dev libsqlite3-dev libaspell-dev libsnmp-dev libpcre3-dev libtidy-dev, then docker-php-ext-install mbstring mcrypt pdo_pgsql curl json intl gd xml zip bz2 opcache, install xdebug via pecl and enable it, download Composer installer with curl and run php composer.phar install. Add a test job in the test stage that runs vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml --coverage-text --colors=never.
